hindi: ॐ सिद्धलक्ष्म्यै नमः। नमस्ते सिद्धिदे देवि सिद्धिं देहि च मे सदा।
english: Om, salutations to Siddhi Lakshmi. Salutations O Goddess who grants powers — grant me powers always
roman: Om Siddhi Lakshmyai namah. Namaste siddhide Devi siddhim dehi cha me sada

english: O Mother who grants all powers, salutations, O giver of victory
roman: Sarva siddhi prade mata namaste vijaya prade

english: You are the giver of the eight powers beginning with Anima, O Maheshwari
roman: Anima adyashtha siddhinam datri tvam Maheshvari

english: O Goddess who grants all powers, giver of powers, of the form of power itself
roman: Sarva siddhi prade Devi siddhide siddhi rupini

hindi: अणिमा लघिमा च महिमा प्राप्तिरेव च।
roman: Anima laghima cha mahima praptir eva cha

hindi: प्राकाम्यं च तथेशित्वं वशित्वं च कामरूपिता॥
english: Prakamya (irresistible will), Ishitva (mastery), Vashitva (control), and Kamarupita (assuming any form)
roman: Prakamyam cha tatheshitvam vashitvam cha kama rupita

english: This Siddhi Lakshmi Stotram — whoever reads it daily with reverence
roman: Siddhi Lakshmi stotram idam yah pathet nityam adarat

hindi: अष्टसिद्धिं च लभते नवनिधिं च विन्दति॥
english: Attains the eight powers and obtains the nine treasures
roman: Ashta siddhim cha labhate nava nidhim cha vindati
